ab: minnaha su nanu muwah?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: hmnakay kung muwah ki.
en: I came on foot.

ab: nanu ku ginlagan su kulu?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: ganalu kung su kulu bas muwah yu.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: pananu su musa kyukay?
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: papiray taraku yaba mu panga kung niya.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: mutu mahanunu musa baruwan karariya hiya?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: mutu gamalu su tu’iy zik musa baruwan hiya.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: maha nanu musa mabaziy tabihi yaki su?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: mutu miray su utubay hiya musa mabaziy tabihi.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: pakusa su nanu musa i Laniy?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: pagalu kung su asu musa i Laniy.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: pakusa nanu musa i Laniy hiya?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: pagalu su sakuki hiya musa i Laniy.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: pagalu nanu taraku’ musa i Takaw hiya?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: pagalu su haylaw kisiya hiya musa i Takaw.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: ganalu su kisya musa Taytung hiya pi?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: hu,ganalu su kisiya hiya musa i Taytung.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: ganalu su kisiya hiya musa i Taytung pi?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: ayat ki, ginalu su sakuki hiya musa i Taytugn.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: kiyan ku nanan su galagan bas llingay runi aw?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: kiyan ,pakura su galayng tikay la ga musa su taxan ku nanan na bas la.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: ki ti inu ku payang sawbih nanan su tu’iy zik runi?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: ungat ku galagan na tu’iy zik runi hiya,musa nanak takusi ku ba’un su gamalu ki.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: gamalu su bas ga katuwa su kabasiya ga patayhuk i baruwan?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: mapu magan ara’ pasapagan witux ga patayhuk i baruwan.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: galalu su haylaw kisya ga katuwa’ bsiya ga patayhuk i Tahaytun?
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: utux pasapangan witux la ga patayhuk i Tahaytun la.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: mutu basiya miray su turaku musa i Ulay aw?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: kina su musa utux pasapangan witux.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: musa katuwa basiya ku ganalu su tu’iy zik muwah sali mu?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?

ab: musa i mapusan ara’ pasapangan witux.
en: B: It takes 20 minutes.

ab: ba su miray tilinsiya aw?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: ba kung miray su tilinsya.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: kiyan ku utubay su?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: kiyan utux ku utubay mu.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: kiyan ku utubay su?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: ungat ku utubay mu.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
